form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up finished sixth of 9 runners at Leicester on January 20 over 4500m, 42 len behind River Run Free with 76kg at $12. Second-up finished second in a small field at Huntingdon on March 11 over 4700m, 2 len behind Jukebox D'eddy with 76kg at $9.50. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh of 9 runners at Hereford on March 25 over 4200m, 44 len behind Jack Doyen carrying 73kg at $15. Race before didn't finish the race at Didmarton on March 7 over 4800m. Appears out of his depth in this.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last run finished fourth of 7 runners at Plumpton on March 16 over 5100m, 63 len behind Ferret Jeeter carrying 72.5kg at $6.50. The run before made some head-way from midfield; finished third of 7 starters at Ffos Las on January 30 over 4800m, in the wet; 6 len behind Followango with 68.5kg at $9. Will be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resuming today after seven months. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Hexham October 3 over 4840m. When resuming last campaign 2 in a small field at this track April 9 over 4600m, 2.75 len behind Unspeakable carrying 70.5kg at $13. Looms as a top chance despite the gap between runs.

form.formComment: Last outing pulled up at Plumpton on March 16 over 5100m. The run before finished fifth of 10 starters at this track on February 12 over 4600m, on rain affected going; 35 len behind Ted The Thief carrying 66kg at $26. Capable enough and cannot be discounted lightly.
